chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 353 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 22-11-2022 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the petitioner, after receiving copy of the comments filed by respondent No.5 from learned A.A.G., Sindh and going through the same, seeks disposal of this petition with direction that in case the petitioner files any application for Health Risk Allowance (Extra Full Basic Pay), the same would be decided by respondent No.5 on merit expeditiously. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
